hero.title: Celebrating Love, Your Way
hero.subtitle: Unique and personalized wedding ceremonies in the Prosecco hills and beyond.

about.title: My Story
about.bio1: Hi, I'm Noemi Bressan! I am a celebrant based in Valdobbiadene, in the heart of the enchanting Venetian Prosecco hills. I specialize in creating personalized wedding ceremonies for couples from all over the world.
about.bio2: Passionate about sincere love, I firmly believe that every couple deserves a ceremony as unique as their love story. Empathy, availability, flexibility, and some useful advice to make that day truly special are my priorities.
about.languagesDesc: Language should not be a barrier to love. I am a native Italian speaker and hold a degree in English and German. I also speak fluent Spanish, which will allow me to narrate your ceremony in different languages.

wedding.title: Wedding Ceremonies
wedding.desc: Shared design of the ceremony. From symbolic rituals to official ones with civil delegation, I convey the emotion of stories and your life journey. Fully customizable texts and rituals in any of the languages I speak.

other.title: Other Services
other.d1: I organize events and guided tours in the beautiful Prosecco Hills and the province of Treviso.
other.d2: Book presentations or corporate and formal events.

addons.title: Additional Services
addons.desc: Site inspections, location advice, direct contact with witnesses, availability to travel out of region and abroad. I can provide contacts with excellent professionals such as sound engineers, DJs, and jazz bands.

step1.title: The first step
step1.desc: Without any obligation, we can organize a video call to evaluate together if I am the right person for your needs. Once the decision is made, we can move on to the next phases.

step2.title: Preparation of the ceremony
step2.desc: I will take care of your speech so that it truly reflects who you are. Together we will define the phases of the ceremony, vows, and rituals, so that everything is prepared with care and in the smallest detail.

step3.title: The Ceremony
step3.desc: It's your big day! I will be present at least 45 minutes in advance and will take care of every detail, from the beginning of the march to the signing of the certificate, to ensure a smooth and flawless ceremony.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can you celebrate legally binding weddings?
faq.a1: Yes! I am available to celebrate both symbolic ceremonies and official rites with civil delegation.
faq.a2: Absolutely yes. I am available to travel outside the Veneto region and outside Italy.
faq.q3: Do you provide the audio system?
faq.a3: I can help you by providing contacts for professional microphone audio systems or extra recorded music, from the ceremony to the party.
faq.q4: Do you know bands for live music?
faq.a4: Certainly! I have contacts with local bands, especially jazz and acoustic.

reviews.name: Giulia & Denis
reviews.text: Noemi made our day unforgettable. She wrote a ceremony that truly spoke about us, moving all the guests. Her sweetness is unparalleled.

reviews.name: Sarah & Tom
reviews.text: We met Noemi and instantly clicked. She delivered our entire ceremony flawlessly in both Italian and English. Our international guests felt completely involved!

reviews.name: Elena & Roberto
reviews.text: A fantastic experience. She helped us prepare everything, from documents to vows, with calm and professionalism. Highly recommended!
